Thanks for contributing! A few notes before you submit:

- The PR title becomes the squash-commit subject and — for feat/fix/perf —
  the user-facing changelog entry. Use Conventional Commits and phrase it
  the way a user should read it.
- See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full guidelines.
-->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- Short summary: what changes, and why. Link the issue if one exists. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test` passes locally
- [ ] Tests cover the change (synthetic fixtures only — never a real account)
- [ ] No credentials or personal data (tokens, auth files, real account/library names, ASINs)
- [ ] Everything is in English
